text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here it is, the long-awaited Arima Kinen! And out
of all the Umamusume chosen to participate, the
one making headlines is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Beast, Grass Wonder! Everyone is on the
edge of their seats, eagerly awaiting her clash
with her biggest rival, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Calm. And very much so. You could say
I've found my comfort zone.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to the moment when the
starting gate opens.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm both grateful and honored to share the
racecourse with such worthy competitors.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But most importantly, I will press forward.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win... This is my race!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let's give this race our all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You two look excited. Don't get too down on
yourselves when I turn out the winner.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: For me, losin' here ain't an option. Comprenden?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Here it is: the fanfare of the Arima Kinen!
